title: Battle of Tholatin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Mandalore (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Mandalore]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |conc= |next= |image= |name=Battle of Tholatin |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}{{FactFile|117|FET 35-36|Boba Fett}} |date=c. [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] |place=[[Tholatin]] |result=[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] victory |side1=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |side2=Mandalorians |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']]''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2=*[[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] **[[Mandalorian Supercommando]]s **[[Gladiator-class assault fighter|''Gladiator''-class fighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Boba-running with a bunch of other guys in Mandalorian armor and jet packs. He even managed to come up with a new Firespray.''"
"''Well, I wasn't going to say anything, but I heard that that same bunch showed up to help liberate Ord Mantell.''"
"''And Tholatin.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Talon Karrde]], and [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]]|}} A '''battle''' at [[Tholatin]] was fought late in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In the battle, the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] under the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] led by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] liberated the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tholatin]] from [[Yuuzhan Vong]] control. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|117|FET 35-36|Boba Fett}} *{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Tholatin |pl=Bitwa o Tholatin }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tholatin, battle of}} [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]] [[Category:Battles of Tholatin]]
